memoryArtifacts.headline: Maria Komnene (1154-1217)
memoryArtifacts.description: Maria Komnene (1154-1217), Latinized Comnena, was the queen of Jerusalem from 1167 until 1174 as the second wife of King Amalric. She occupied a central position in the Kingdom of Jerusalem for twenty …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem於1154年出生時，她的父親John Doukas Komnenos26歲，母親Maria Taronitissa25歲。她於1167年與Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1217年享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem于1154年出生时，她的父亲John Doukas Komnenos26岁，母亲Maria Taronitissa25岁。她于1167年与Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1217年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem was born in 1154, her father, John Doukas Komnenos, was 26 and her mother, Maria Taronitissa, was 25. She married Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem in 1167. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1217, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem est née en 1154, son père, John Doukas Komnenos, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maria Taronitissa, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem en 1167. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1217, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem 1154 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Doukas Komnenos 26 und ihre Mutter Maria Taronitissa 25. Sie hat 1167 Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1217 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem è nata il nel 1154, sua padre, John Doukas Komnenos, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Maria Taronitissa, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem nel 1167. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1217, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalemが1154年に生まれた時，父John Doukas Komnenosは26歳，母Maria Taronitissaは25歳であった。1167年にAmaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalemと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1217年に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem(이)가 1154년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Doukas Komnenos(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Taronitissa(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1167년 Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1217년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem nasceu em 1154, seu pai, John Doukas Komnenos, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maria Taronitissa, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem em 1167. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1217, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem родилась в 1154 г., её отцу по имени John Doukas Komnenos было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Taronitissa, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem в 1167 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1217 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem nació en 1154, su papá, John Doukas Komnenos, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Maria Taronitissa, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem en 1167. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1217, a la edad de 63 años.
